creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Created attachment 208995
Cyberchef 9.11.2 diff

Update Cyberchef from 9.9.0 to 9.11.2

Changelog:
SQLITE, EVT, EVTX and Signatures added
Added WAV extractor
Added extractors for BZIP2, XZ, GIF89
Made GIF extractor more robust
Implemented CFB, OFB, and CTR modes for Blowfish operations 
Tidied up Lorenz operation and created new Bletchley module for WW2-era ciphers
Lorenz operation added
